summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new CRM features: Login page redesign (no registration, company branding), User Management (CRUD with permissions), WhatsApp Logs (stats, filters, pagination), and Company Settings Login Page tab. Fixed 1 critical bug: pwd_context.hash() was undefined in user creation/update endpoints - replaced with hash_password(). All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for user creation (minor - functionality works)

bugs_fixed.issue: NameError: name 'pwd_context' is not defined - User creation and update endpoints were using undefined pwd_context.hash() instead of the existing hash_password() function
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced pwd_context.hash(user_data.password) with hash_password(user_data.password) at lines 4932 and 4977
bugs_fixed.severity: CRITICAL - blocked all user creation/update operations

seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested: 1) Login page shows company branding (VMP Pharma Distributors, tagline) with NO registration tab - only Sign In. 2) Users page at /users shows user list with stats cards (Total Users, Admins, Staff), Add User modal with permission toggles, Edit User modal, Delete functionality. 3) WhatsApp Logs page at /whatsapp-logs shows stats cards (Total Messages, Successful, Failed, Success Rate), filters (type, status), search, pagination. 4) Company Settings has 'Login Page' tab with tagline input, background color picker, background image upload, and live preview. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_users_whatsapp.py cover all user management and WhatsApp logs APIs.

login_page.company_branding: PASS - Shows 'VMP Pharma Distributors' and 'Doctor Lead Management System' tagline
login_page.no_registration: PASS - No Register/Sign Up tab present, only Sign In
login_page.login_form: PASS - Email, password inputs and Sign In button work correctly
login_page.dynamic_styling: PASS - Background color from company settings applied

users_page.page_load: PASS - Users page loads at /users with data-testid='users-page'
users_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Users, Admins, Staff counts
users_page.users_table: PASS - Displays all users with name, email, role, permissions, created date
users_page.add_user_modal: PASS - Opens with name, email, password, role fields and permission toggles
users_page.edit_user_modal: PASS - Opens with pre-filled data and Update User button
users_page.permission_toggles: PASS - 14 module permissions with Select All/Clear All buttons

whatsapp_logs_page.page_load: PASS - WhatsApp Logs page loads at /whatsapp-logs with data-testid='whatsapp-logs-page'
whatsapp_logs_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Messages, Successful, Failed, Success Rate
whatsapp_logs_page.filters: PASS - Search input, Type filter (All Types), Status filter (All Status)
whatsapp_logs_page.buttons: PASS - Refresh and Clear All buttons present
whatsapp_logs_page.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No WhatsApp logs found' when empty

company_settings_login_tab.tab_navigation: PASS - Login Page tab clickable and switches content
company_settings_login_tab.preview_section: PASS - Shows live preview of login page appearance
company_settings_login_tab.tagline_input: PASS - Login Tagline input field present
company_settings_login_tab.background_color: PASS - Color picker with hex value input

sidebar_navigation.users_link: PASS - Users link visible in sidebar and navigates to /users
sidebar_navigation.whatsapp_logs_link: PASS - WhatsApp Logs link visible in sidebar and navigates to /whatsapp-logs

backend_api.auth_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token and user
backend_api.auth_me: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns current user with permissions
backend_api.get_users: PASS - GET /api/users returns user list (admin only)
backend_api.create_user: PASS - POST /api/users creates new user with permissions
backend_api.update_user: PASS - PUT /api/users/{id} updates user details and permissions
backend_api.cannot_delete_self: PASS - Admin cannot delete own account (400 error)
backend_api.get_whatsapp_logs: PASS - GET /api/whatsapp-logs returns logs with pagination
backend_api.get_whatsapp_logs_filtered: PASS - Filters by status and message_type work
backend_api.get_whatsapp_stats: PASS - GET /api/whatsapp-logs/stats returns total, success, failed, by_type
backend_api.public_company_settings: PASS - GET /api/public/company-settings returns branding for login page
